title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR CONTEXTUAL MACHINE LEARNING PROMPT GENERATION
summary:
A method for training a text generation machine learning model for prompt generation includes receiving a plurality of training text strings; executing a text generation machine learning model using each of the plurality of training text strings to generate a plurality of training generated text strings, each of the plurality of generated text strings corresponding to generating a content item; executing a content scoring machine learning model using each of the plurality of generated text strings to generate a text performance score for each of the plurality of training generated text strings; for each of the plurality of generated text strings, adjusting one or more weights or parameters of the text generation machine learning model proportional to the text performance score for the generated text string.

ABSTRACT
A method for training a text generation machine learning model for prompt generation includes receiving a plurality of training text strings; executing a text generation machine learning model using each of the plurality of training text strings to generate a plurality of training generated text strings, each of the plurality of generated text strings corresponding to generating a content item; executing a content scoring machine learning model using each of the plurality of generated text strings to generate a text performance score for each of the plurality of training generated text strings; for each of the plurality of generated text strings, adjusting one or more weights or parameters of the text generation machine learning model proportional to the text performance score for the generated text string.
1

details:
Amendments to the Claims:
This listing of claims will replace all prior versions and listings of claims in the application:
Listing of Claims:
1
1. (Original) A method, comprising:receiving, by one or more processors from a client device, a request to generate an image;
executing, by the one or more processors, a text generation machine learning model based on the request to generate a candidate generated text string identifying one or more features, the text generation machine learning model trained based on images each corresponding to an image performance score exceeding a threshold;
executing, by the one or more processors, an image generation machine learning model using the candidate generated text string to generate one or more images each according to the one or more features identified in the candidate generated text string; and
transmitting, by the one or more processors, the one or more images to the client device.

Original

2
2. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein receiving the request to generate the image comprises receiving a request text string, andwherein executing the text generation machine learning model based on the request comprises executing the text generation machine learning model using the request text string to generate the candidate generated text string identifying the one or more features.

Original

3
3. (Original) The method of claim 2, 
wherein the request text string comprises a first part, andwherein executing the text generation machine learning model using the request text string comprises executing, by the one or more processors, the text generation machine learning model

using the request text string to generate the candidate generated text string comprising the first part and a generated second part.
Original

4
4. (Original) The method of claim 2, 
wherein the request text string comprises a first part, andwherein executing the text generation machine learning model using the request text string comprises executing, by the one or more processors, the text generation machine learning model using the request text string to generate the candidate generated text string consisting of a generated second part.

Original

5
5. (Original) The method of claim 2, 
wherein the request text string comprises a first part comprising a first text feature and a second text feature, andwherein executing the text generation machine learning model using the request text string comprises executing, by the one or more processors, the text generation machine learning model using the request text string to generate the candidate generated text string including the first text feature and a third text feature replacing the second text feature.

Original

6
6. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
further comprising:selecting, by the one or more processors, the text generation machine learning model for execution based on the text generation machine learning model corresponding to a target audience identifier extracted from a message received from the client device.

Original

7
7. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
further comprising:

executing, by the one or more processors, the image generation machine learning model using a training generated text string to generate an image each according to one or more features identified in the training generated text string;
executing, by the one or more processors, a content scoring machine learning model or an image scoring machine learning model to generate an image score for the generated image; and
adjusting, by the one or more processors, the one or weights or parameters of the text generation machine learning model based on the image score for the generated image.
Original

8
8. (Original) The method of claim 7, 
wherein executing the content scoring machine learning model or the image scoring machine learning model comprises executing, by the one or more processors, the image scoring machine learning model to generate the image score for the generated image.
Original

9
9. (Original) The method of claim 7, 
wherein executing the content scoring machine learning model or the image scoring machine learning model comprises executing, by the one or more processors, the content scoring machine learning model to generate the image score for the generated image.
Original

10
10. (Original) The method of claim 7, 
further comprising:training, by the one or more processors, the content scoring machine learning model by:
labeling, by the one or more processors, each of a plurality of training images with a label corresponding to the same target audience based on the training image originating from a data source having a stored association with an identifier of the target audience in a database in memory.

Original

11
11. (Original) A system, comprising:one or more processors configured by machine-readable instructions to:
receive, from a client device, a request to generate an image;
execute a text generation machine learning model based on the request to generate a candidate generated text string identifying one or more features, the text generation machine learning model trained based on images each corresponding to an image performance score exceeding a threshold;
execute an image generation machine learning model using the candidate generated text string to generate one or more images each according to the one or more features identified in the candidate generated text string; and
transmit the one or more images to the client device.

Original

12
12. (Original) The system of claim 11, 
wherein the one or more processors are configured to receive the request to generate the image by receiving a request text string, andwherein the one or more processors are configured to execute the text generation machine learning model based on the request by executing the text generation machine learning model using the request text string to generate the candidate generated text string identifying the one or more features.

Original

13
13. (Original) The system of claim 12, 
wherein the request text string comprises a first part, and

wherein the one or more processors are configured to execute the text generation machine learning model using the request text string by executing the text generation machine learning model using the request text string to generate the candidate generated text string comprising the first part and a generated second part.
Original

14
14. (Original) The system of claim 12, 
wherein the request text string comprises a first part, and wherein the one or more processors are configured to execute the text generation machine learning model using the request text string by executing the text generation machine learning model using the request text string to generate the candidate generated text string consisting of a generated second part.
Original

15
15. (Original) A system for training a text generation machine learning model for prompt generation, comprising:one or more processors configured by machine-readable instructions to:
receive a plurality of training text strings;
execute a text generation machine learning model using each of the plurality of training text strings to generate a plurality of training generated text strings, each of the plurality of generated text strings corresponding to generating a content item;
execute a content scoring machine learning model using each of the plurality of generated text strings to generate a text performance score for each of the plurality of training generated text strings;

for each of the plurality of generated text strings, adjust one or more weights or parameters of the text generation machine learning model proportional to the text performance score for the generated text string.
Original

16
16. (Original) The system of claim 15, 
wherein the one or more processors are further configured to:receive, from a client device, a candidate text string, the candidate text string requesting to generate an image;
execute the text generation machine learning model using the candidate text string to generate a candidate generated text string identifying one or more features;
execute an image generation machine learning model using the candidate generated text string to generate one or more images each according to the one or more features identified in the candidate generated text string; and
transmit the one or more images to the client device.

Original

17
17. (Original) The system of claim 16, 
wherein the candidate text string comprises a first part, and wherein the one or more processors are configured to execute the text generation machine learning model using the candidate text string by executing the text generation machine learning model using the candidate text string to generate the candidate generated text string comprising the first part and a generated second part.
Original

18
18. (Original) The system of claim 16, 
wherein the candidate text string comprises a first part, and

wherein the one or more processors are configured to execute the text generation machine learning model using the candidate text string by executing the text generation machine learning model using the candidate text string to generate the candidate generated text string consisting of a generated second part.
Original

19
19. (Original) The system of claim 16, 
wherein the candidate text string comprises a first part comprising a first text feature and a second text feature, andwherein the one or more processors are configured to execute the text generation machine learning model using the candidate text string by executing the text generation machine learning model using the candidate text string to generate the candidate generated text string including the first text feature and a third text feature replacing the second text feature.

Original

20
20. (Original) The system of claim 16, 
wherein the one or more processors are further configured to:select the text generation machine learning model for execution based on the text generation machine learning model corresponding to a target audience identifier extracted from a message received from the client device.

Original
